sentences.text: at the fair written by elizabeth jane pustilnik focus question what can you ride at the fair
you can ride the big wheel
you can ride the little car
you can ride the long train
you can ride the fast cup
you can ride the painted horse
you can ride the giant swing
you can ride the tiny plane
what is your favorite ride at the fair

connections writing and art would you prefer to go on a fast ride or a high ride at the fair why draw a picture and write about it math which ride from the book would each person in your class like to go on the most show the information on a class graph
